case_title: KULDEEP KAUR VS. SUN-CHUAN DAI MD ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-06-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
